<!-- Features and fixes are both welcome here. Keep PRs focused — one thing per PR. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link an issue if there is one (#123). -->

## Type

- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 🐛 Fix
- [ ] 📚 Docs
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] If I changed the CLI / config / providers / Guides, I ran `pnpm docs:generate` and committed the regenerated `docs/generated/*.json`
- [ ] Stays within the local‑first safety model (no model APIs, no cloud, no telemetry, no auto‑push/merge, no secrets in prompts/logs)
- [ ] Scoped to one change; no unrelated reformatting

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything that helps the review — tradeoffs, things you're unsure about, screenshots for UI. -->
